record.field: Standard oil change with oil filter replacement
Front or rear brake pad replacement and rotor inspection
Full engine diagnostic scan with OBD-II reader
Air conditioning system diagnosis and repair/recharge
Tire change with wheel alignment and balancing
Minor to moderate body dent repair
Full paint job for a single panel
Complete suspension check and parts replacement
Transmission fluid change and system check
Timing belt, water pump, and tensioner replacement
Interior and exterior full detailing service

Radiator fan not working, overheating in traffic
Turbocharger whistle noise and loss of power

Oil leak spotted under the car after parking

Clutch pedal feels spongy, gear shifting is hard
ABS warning light stays on, brake pedal pulsating
Battery draining overnight, car won't start in the morning

Front left fender: sand, prime, base coat, clear coat. Color match verification done.
Turbocharger wastegate actuator replaced. Boost pressure normalized.
Front brake pads replacement and rotor resurfacing. Checked rear brakes - still at 60% life.
Electrical system full scan. Alternator voltage regulator failing - intermittent output.
Front left fender: sand, prime, base coat, clear coat. Color match verification done.
Front brake caliper rebuilt. New pistons and seals installed.
No fault codes after 50km test drive
Battery replaced with new 70Ah unit. Terminals cleaned and anti-corrosion applied.
Alignment angles within spec after test drive
Rear differential oil change. Bearings inspected - normal wear.
Front left fender: sand, prime, base coat, clear coat. Color match verification done.
Engine diagnostic scan - found O2 sensor fault code P0135. Replaced upstream O2 sensor and cleared codes.
Clutch disc, pressure plate, and throw-out bearing replaced.
Spark plugs replaced (full set). Ignition coil on cylinder 3 also replaced.
Fuel injectors ultrasonically cleaned. Throttle body cleaned and reset.
Front brake pads replacement and rotor resurfacing. Checked rear brakes - still at 60% life.
Front brake caliper rebuilt. New pistons and seals installed.
Alignment angles within spec after test drive
ABS speed sensor replaced on front right wheel. Codes cleared, test drive OK.
Alignment angles within spec after test drive
Catalytic converter replaced. Exhaust system inspection - no other leaks found.
Fuel injectors ultrasonically cleaned. Throttle body cleaned and reset.
A/C system diagnosis: Low refrigerant level, suspected leak in evaporator. Recharged with R134a.
Test drive completed - all systems normal
Cooling fan relay and motor replaced. Tested in traffic - no overheating.
Test drive completed - all systems normal
ABS speed sensor replaced on front right wheel. Codes cleared, test drive OK.
Timing belt and water pump replacement. Tensioner and idler pulley also replaced.
Paint match is excellent under natural and artificial light

Second visit here, consistently great work. Will keep coming back.

Fair pricing and honest assessment. They could have upsold but didn't.
Professional, fast, and reasonably priced. What more could you ask?
Very clean workshop, organized and professional environment.

They found issues I didn't even know about. Saved me from a breakdown.

I appreciate the follow-up call after the service.
